result.markdown:
# Unit Conversions {#sec-appendix-units .unnumbered}

## Mass Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| g | mg | 1000 |
| mg | μg | 1000 |
| μg | ng | 1000 |
| ng | pg | 1000 |
| kg | g | 1000 |

## Volume Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| L | mL | 1000 |
| mL | μL | 1000 |
| dL | L | 0.1 |
| L | dL | 10 |

## Concentration Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| mg/L | μg/mL | 1 |
| μg/mL | ng/mL | 1000 |
| mg/dL | mg/L | 10 |
| g/L | mg/mL | 1 |
| % (w/v) | mg/mL | 10 |

## Time Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| hours | minutes | 60 |
| days | hours | 24 |
| hours | days | 1/24 |
| minutes | hours | 1/60 |

## Clearance Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| L/h | mL/min | 16.67 |
| mL/min | L/h | 0.06 |
| L/h | L/day | 24 |
| mL/min/kg | L/h/70kg | × 4.2 |

## AUC Units

| From | To | Multiply By |
|------|----|-------------|
| mg·h/L | μg·h/mL | 1 |
| μg·h/mL | ng·h/mL | 1000 |

## Common PK Unit Conversions in R


::: {.cell}

```{.r .cell-code}
# Useful conversion functions
mg_to_ug <- function(x) x * 1000
ug_to_ng <- function(x) x * 1000
L_to_mL <- function(x) x * 1000
hour_to_min <- function(x) x * 60
min_to_hour <- function(x) x / 60
CL_Lh_to_mLmin <- function(x) x * 1000 / 60
CL_mLmin_to_Lh <- function(x) x * 60 / 1000

# Example
CL_mLmin_to_Lh(120)  # 120 mL/min = 7.2 L/h
```

::: {.cell-output .cell-output-stdout}

```
[1] 7.2
```


:::
:::


## Dose Normalization

- mg/kg → mg: multiply by body weight (kg)
- mg/m² → mg: multiply by body surface area (m²)

$$BSA (m^2) = \sqrt{\frac{Height(cm) \times Weight(kg)}{3600}}$$

## Temperature

- °C to K: add 273.15
- K to °C: subtract 273.15
